历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2022 was approximately 2639, in 2023 approximately 3191, in 2024 it significantly shifted backward to about 7057 (a notable loosening that year), and in 2025 it rebounded to about 4209; the rankings have fluctuated sharply over the past 4 years, with an abnormal backward shift in 2024 followed by a significant rebound in 2025, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4209. The enrollment plan for this university in the Ningxia Science Group (Physics Category) is: 30 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 30 in 2025, and 30 in 2026. The 2026 plan is unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the competitive landscape is basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 38th on the main list, with rankings stable in the 36-39 range in recent years. The university's level continues to attract candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition disputes, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 82nd (average), short video exposure is moderate, with no sudden increase or decrease in application attention; no record of admission cutoff line breaks in recent years; shares Northeastern University's discipline evaluations: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-; top majors like Automation (corresponding to Control Science and Engineering A+) and Computer Science and Technology (A) have strong appeal to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering categories continue to be highly recommended in 2026; majors like Automation and Computer Science have high social popularity; the total number of Ningxia Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 66,000 (slightly up from about 65,897 in 2025), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 44,550 (basically unchanged), with minimal change in candidate numbers; Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, and in 2025 it enrolled 32 students in Ningxia (about 1.23% of its total national enrollment of 2,602), with a stable enrollment share; Ningxia candidates have a strong willingness to study outside the province, and as a 985 branch campus, it has some regional appeal in the northwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings (abnormal backward shift in 2024 followed by a significant rebound to 4209 in 2025), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in total candidates, and persistently high popularity of engineering majors, the 2026 ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from the 4209 baseline (slightly intensified competition); the predicted minimum ranking is about 4239, with a range of 3739-4739.

- Computer Science and Technology
- Communication Engineering
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Mechatronic Engineering
- Instrumentation (Smart Optoelectronic Sensing)
- Smart Sensing Engineering

- Mechanical (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3739-4739, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 top majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3739), you can focus on challenging top majors like Automation and Computer Science and Technology (A-level disciplines); if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>4739), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
